page: Google Cloud Platform x4-1920-32t-metal is a bare-metal server instance belonging to the x4 server family. It features an x86_64 CPU architecture with 1920 dedicated vCPUs and 32,768.0 GB of RAM. This configuration provides a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 17.07 GB per core, placing it in the memory-optimized class of hardware.

This server type does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached options. Additionally, there are zero integrated GPUs and zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this instance.

Given the massive memory footprint of 32 TB and 1920 dedicated vCPUs, this bare-metal instance represents a highly specialized hardware class designed for extreme resource density. The absence of local storage and GPUs focuses its qualitative cost efficiency on workloads requiring massive in-memory processing capacity. This configuration is designed for large-scale in-memory databases, massive enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy data-processing pipelines that operate entirely within system memory.
description: Google Cloud Platform x4-1920-32t-metal is an x86_64 bare-metal server in the x4 family, configured with 1920 dedicated vCPUs and 32,768.0 GB of RAM. This configuration delivers a high memory-to-core ratio of 17.07 GB per vCPU, positioning it within the memory-optimized category. The server does not feature local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring network-attached storage for data persistence. With zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses, network architecture must be managed externally. This instance is built for massive scale-up workloads, such as large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and memory-intensive data processing pipelines that require substantial memory capacity and high core counts without the need for local physical disks or hardware acceleration.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform x4-1920-32t-metal is an x86_64 bare-metal server featuring 1920 dedicated vCPUs and 32,768 GB of RAM, designed for massive in-memory enterprise workloads.

tagline: A bare-metal instance featuring 1920 dedicated vCPUs and 32 TB of RAM for massive in-memory enterprise workloads.
